response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Otonose Kanade performing a song at the start, no clear title found ('No title' on screen). 2. Identified 'BANG!!!' as the second song at 03:13, with credits ryo(supercell) and Giga. 3. Simplified search for 'BANG!!!' lyrics as 'BANG!!! Giga Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Obtained lyrics and translation for 'BANG!!!'.
response.global_summary: This video features two musical performances by virtual idols. The first is a solo performance by Otonose Kanade, and the second is a duet of the song "BANG!!!" performed by Otonose Kanade and Kobo Kanaeru.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performs a solo song on stage. The text in the corner initially reads 'No title'.
Otonose Kanade and Kobo Kanaeru perform the song 'BANG!!!'. Text on screen confirms credits to ryo (supercell) and Giga.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like it, hate it, common sense, I don't care - blow it up with a BANG!!!
Bring it. majority, I have no defeat
Where did this 'border' come from? Whose rule is it?
And then, I passed that day
I got stronger
I blew the laughter away
I have something to say
I don't want to say what I want to say
I don't want to do what I don't want to do
I don't have any ill will
It's only natural, I'm a mess
I'm still me, I'm still me
Nothing is impossible, nothing is not
Believe in myself
Everybody Let it Bang!
The light that each one emits
Like a diamond, one and only
All your hidden talents, Show me
Don't contain it, spread your feeling.
For once in your life
With your real colors, Collide Tonight Tonight.
Everybody Let it Bang!
